sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: helps meals actually work because a fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one. efficient energy source because that can be a strength in the right context. small amounts can change a whole meal because that leverage matters when the fat quality is good.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: calorie density is brutally high because tiny serving errors matter here. extremely calorie dense by default because that is the unavoidable category burden. not a complete food on its own because even the better fats are still just part of a meal.
